name: BBQ Cheeseburgers
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the ground beef, onion, and 2 tablespoons of barbecue sauce. Mix thoroughly.
2. Shape the mixture into four 1/2-inch-thick patties.
3. Place the patties on the grill over medium ash-covered coals.
4. Grill for 14 to 16 minutes or until the centers are no longer pink, turning once.
5. Approximately one minute before the end of cooking time, brush the top side of the burgers with additional barbecue sauce. Top each patty with a slice of cheese.
6. Cook until the cheese slices are melted.
7. Line the bottom half of each roll with lettuce and tomato. Top with the cheeseburger. Close the sandwiches.
